notes: 2a: handlePickupChange auto-fills return = pickup+24h; returnTouchedRef (useRef(isEdit)) prevents clobbering manual edits; invalid (re<=pu) still auto-fixed. 2b: billableShifts24h(start,end,skipPartialDay) + SECOND_DAY_GRACE_MS=4h — when checked and overage beyond whole days <=4h, round shifts DOWN (min 1); >4h billed normally (ceil). Booking.skipPartialDay Boolean @default(false) (additive, safe for prisma db push). Threaded: Zod create/update, quoteEstimate/createBookingDraft/rebuildBookingEstimate/confirmBooking, /quote //quote/export //draft/ PATCH (dry-run+write+wasInReview), client mirror rentalTime.ts (identical math), DatesCard checkbox, edit-mode hydration via serialized booking. Custom line items unaffected (no shift mult). 14 new grace unit tests. Review APPROVE, zero CRITICAL/HIGH; MEDIUM/LOW all pre-existing (ESM/CJS const dup is intentional, labelShort divergence + durationPart dead code predate PR) — comment clarified, pre-existing untouched (out of scope).
